title: How to get in touch – Laurence Turner - working hard for Northfield
text_excerpt: How to get in touch – Laurence Turner - working hard for Northfield LAURENCE TURNER Home Latest news and views Contact and support Check if you are a constituent How to get in touch See what I can help with Office standards About me Get updates Donate How to get in touch You can get in touch using the form opposite. You can also contact me in the following ways: Email laurence.turner.mp@parliament.uk Phone 0121 516 5770 Constituency office (note - meetings are by appointment only). The Factory 5 Devon Way Longbridge B31 2TS Please include your home address in written correspondence so that I can prioritise messages from constituents. Please note also that surgeries are not held at the office - they are held at sites across the constituency on a rotating basis. Full Name Email address First line of your address Postcode Subscribe to a regular e-newsletter? Message Send message Promoted by and on behalf of Laurence Turner of Terry Duffy House, 1 Thomas Street, B70 6NT Privacy policy Acceptable use policy Cookie Preferences This website was built at no cost to taxpayers with Quarto
